conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 10 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a high volume or burden of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="263 (66.2%)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 1, 'Volume of metastases - no. (%)' row 'High' for 'ADT plus Docetaxel (N=397)' column."
  B: value="263 (66.2)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="Value extracted from Table 1, Baseline Characteristics of the Patients, for the ADT plus Docetaxel arm."

---
Column 2: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
